description: Update the VanMan marketing website with 7 new app features: Workflow Automation, Email Integration (Gmail + Outlook), Day Plan, Calendar Events, Live Truck Tracking, Materials & Costing. Includes new feature pages, blog posts, and help center articles.

userStories.title: Add 3 new features to the features list
userStories.description: As a website visitor, I want to see Workflow Automation, Email Integration, and Day Plan listed on the features page.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/lib/features.ts to understand the existing Feature interface and entries

Add 'workflow-automation' entry: name 'Workflow Automation', tagline 'Automate your business rules', icon 'Zap', href '/features/workflow-automation', 4 bullets covering visual workflow builder, trigger-based automation, conditional logic with approvals, pre-built templates

Add 'email-integration' entry: name 'Email Integration', tagline 'Your inbox meets your jobs', icon 'Mail', href '/features/email-integration', 4 bullets covering Gmail and Outlook support, automatic email-to-job matching, reply from VanMan, attachment capture

Add 'day-plan' entry: name 'Day Plan', tagline 'Your daily operations at a glance', icon 'MapPin', href '/features/day-plan', 4 bullets covering calendar+map view, colour-coded truck routes, cross-highlighting, real-time updates
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added 3 new entries to src/lib/features.ts with correct icons and bullets. Also updated existing entries for calendar-scheduling, fleet-management, and invoicing-xero with new bullet points.

userStories.title: Create Workflow Automation feature page data
userStories.description: As a website visitor, I want a dedicated /features/workflow-automation page so I can learn about VanMan's workflow automation.
acceptanceCriteria: Read src/lib/feature-pages/types.ts for the FeaturePageData interface

Create src/lib/feature-pages/workflow-automation.ts following FeaturePageData interface exactly
Title 'Workflow Automation', tagline 'Automate your business rules'
3 benefits: visual drag-and-drop workflow builder, trigger-based automation (job created, status changed, booking received), built-in templates for common workflows

3 detail sections: the visual editor with trigger/condition/action/delay/approval nodes, action types (send SMS, send email, change status, create Xero invoice, call webhook), execution logs and dry-run testing
Integration callout referencing job-management, customer-communications, invoicing-xero
Related features: job-management, customer-communications, invoicing-xero
SEO title 'Workflow Automation for Moving Companies | VanMan'
Register in src/lib/feature-pages/index.ts with import and record entry
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/feature-pages/workflow-automation.ts with 3 benefits, 3 detail sections, integration callout, and SEO metadata. Registered in index.ts.

userStories.title: Create Email Integration feature page data

Title 'Email Integration', tagline 'Your inbox meets your jobs'
3 benefits: automatic job matching (emails with job numbers captured against jobs), reply from VanMan (respond without leaving the app), works with Gmail and Outlook/Microsoft 365
3 detail sections: one-click OAuth connect for Gmail or Outlook, real-time email capture via webhooks (Gmail Pub/Sub and Microsoft Graph), email threading with attachment storage
Integration callout referencing job-management, customer-communications
Related features: job-management, customer-communications, workflow-automation
SEO title 'Gmail & Outlook Integration for Moving Companies | VanMan'
Register in src/lib/feature-pages/index.ts with import and record entry

userStories.notes: Created src/lib/feature-pages/email-integration.ts with Gmail+Outlook coverage, 3 benefits, 3 detail sections. Registered in index.ts.
